pattern: Flood-fill each unvisited land cell to measure its connected component's size, tracking the largest area found.
hints: Each island is a 4-directionally connected group of ones.
Sweep every cell; when you hit an unvisited one, explore its whole component counting cells and marking them visited.
Keep the maximum component size across all islands, defaulting to zero.

edge_inputs.description: two islands, the larger six-cell one wins
diagonal touch does not connect islands
L-shaped island connected through corner cell
single column with a gap forms two islands

stress.description: random binary grid up to max dimensions
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    m = rng.randint(1, 50)
    n = rng.randint(1, 50)
    grid = [[1 if rng.random() < 0.45 else 0 for _ in range(n)] for _ in range(m)]
    return [grid]
